name: open_app
description: Opens any application on the Mac. Use this whenever the user asks to open, launch, or start any app, website, or program. Always call this tool — never just say you opened it.

name: web_search
description: Searches the web for any information.

name: weather_report
description: Gives the weather report to user.

name: send_message
description: Sends a text message via WhatsApp, Telegram, or other messaging platform.

name: reminder
description: Sets a timed reminder using macOS Reminders.app.

name: youtube_video
description: Controls YouTube. Use for: playing videos, summarizing a video's content, getting video info, or showing trending videos.

region.description: Country code for trending e.g. SK, US

name: screen_process
description: Captures and analyzes the screen or webcam image. MUST be called when user asks what is on screen, what you see, analyze my screen, look at camera, etc. You have NO visual ability without this tool. After calling this tool, stay SILENT — the vision module speaks directly.

angle.description: 'screen' to capture display, 'camera' for webcam. Default: 'screen'

text.description: The question or instruction about the captured image

name: computer_settings
description: Controls the computer: volume, brightness, window management, keyboard shortcuts, media playback.

value.description: Value for the action (e.g. volume level 0-100)

name: desktop_control
description: Controls the desktop environment: organize windows, manage files on desktop, open folders, empty trash.

action.description: Action: organize_desktop | list_files | open_folder | empty_trash | show_desktop

name: browser_control
description: Controls a browser: navigate, click, type, take screenshot, extract text from web pages.

action.description: navigate | click | type | screenshot | extract_text | scroll

name: file_controller
description: Manages files: create, read, write, copy, move, delete, list directory, search files.

action.description: create | read | write | copy | move | delete | list | search | info

name: code_helper
description: Helps with coding tasks: explain code, review, fix bugs, optimize, generate documentation, run scripts.

action.description: explain | review | fix | optimize | document | run | test | generate

code.description: Code to analyze or file path

name: dev_agent
description: Autonomous development agent for complex multi-step coding tasks. Creates files, edits code, runs commands.

name: agent_task
description: Executes complex multi-step tasks requiring multiple different tools. Examples: 'research X and save to file', 'find and organize files'. DO NOT use for single commands. NEVER use for Steam/Epic — use game_updater.

goal.description: Complete description of what to accomplish

name: computer_control
description: System-level operations: shutdown, restart, sleep, lock, battery status, disk space, network info.

action.description: shutdown | restart | sleep | lock | battery | disk | network | processes | kill_process

name: game_updater
description: Checks for game updates and manages game installations (Steam/Epic). Limited on macOS.

shutdown_when_done.description: Shut down PC when download finishes

name: flight_finder
description: Searches Google Flights and speaks the best options.

name: file_processor
description: Processes any file that the user has uploaded or dropped onto the interface. Supports: images, PDFs, Word docs, CSV/Excel, JSON/XML, code files, audio, video, archives, presentations.

file_path.description: Full path to the file. Leave empty to use the currently uploaded file.

action.description: What to do: describe | ocr | summarize | extract_text | analyze | review | fix | explain | convert | info

instruction.description: Free-form instruction if action doesn't cover it.

start.description: Start time for trim: seconds or HH:MM:SS

end.description: End time for trim: seconds or HH:MM:SS
